hand.title: Daily Hand

events.text: Your cards — 9, J. Your opponent raised before the cards were dealt. You called.
River — Queen. Your opponent fired a large river bet.

wrongReasons: 9 8 is close, but the river lead is the tell. The correct hand picked up more on the river than 9 8 would have.
Q 7 makes a three of a kind here — a hand that strong would have raised earlier and pushed harder for maximum value. The measured sizing in this hand points to something weaker.
J A has little reason to lead the river here — one pair can't comfortably go for value after calling two streets.
hand.explanation:
Answer: 2 K

Your opponent flopped two pair and bet all three streets with growing sizing. The consistent pressure — especially the larger turn bet — signals a hand strong enough to protect but not quite a monster.
